channel.title: little tools, what's new
channel.description: New free, ad-free, privacy-first browser tools by Kesava. Every entry is a tool that landed at tools.iamkesava.com. Subscribe to know when new ones ship.

item.title: Passage Audit
item.description: Score every passage on your page for AI retrievability. Catches thin copy that disappears when an AI chunks the page.

item.title: AEO Readiness Scorer
item.description: Score any page on twelve structural signals AI search engines use to decide what to cite. Offline Python script.

item.title: Case Converter
item.description: Convert text between Title Case, camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, PascalCase, and more.

item.title: Character Counter
item.description: Count characters, words, sentences, paragraphs, and estimate reading time.

item.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
item.description: Generate placeholder text by paragraphs, sentences, or words.

item.title: Text Cleaner
item.description: Remove extra whitespace, line breaks, special characters, duplicate lines.

item.title: Find & Replace
item.description: Search and replace text with regex support and case sensitivity toggle.

item.title: Word Frequency
item.description: Analyze word frequency with bar charts, filtering, and CSV export.

item.title: Headline Analyzer
item.description: Score headlines for emotional value, power words, readability, and click potential.

item.title: Text Diff
item.description: Compare two texts side-by-side or inline with line-by-line diff.

item.title: Clipboard Manager
item.description: Save, search, and organize text clips in your browser.

item.title: Markdown Editor
item.description: Write and preview Markdown with live rendering and export.

item.title: Invoice Generator
item.description: Create professional invoices with PDF export and local storage.

item.title: Link-in-Bio Builder
item.description: Create a link-in-bio page with custom links and themes.

item.title: Color Palette
item.description: Generate harmonious color palettes with multiple harmony rules.

item.title: Color Converter
item.description: Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, and other color formats.

item.title: Contrast Checker
item.description: Check WCAG contrast ratios for accessibility compliance.

item.title: Gradient Generator
item.description: Create CSS gradients with visual editor and code export.

item.title: Box Shadow
item.description: Design CSS box shadows with visual controls.

item.title: Border Radius
item.description: Visualize and generate CSS border-radius values.

item.title: Glassmorphism
item.description: Generate glass and soft-UI effects with CSS output.

item.title: Flexbox Playground
item.description: Learn and experiment with CSS Flexbox interactively.

item.title: CSS Grid
item.description: Build CSS Grid layouts visually with template controls.

item.title: OG Image Generator
item.description: Create Open Graph images for social sharing.

item.title: Favicon Generator
item.description: Generate favicons from text, emoji, or images.

item.title: Screenshot Beautifier
item.description: Add backgrounds, shadows, and frames to screenshots.

item.title: QR Code Generator
item.description: Generate QR codes with custom colors and sizes.

item.title: Keyframe Animator
item.description: Build CSS @keyframes animations visually with timeline editor.

item.title: Easing Editor
item.description: Design cubic-bezier, spring, and linear() easing curves.

item.title: Scroll Animation
item.description: Generate scroll-driven CSS animations with live preview.

item.title: JSON Formatter
item.description: Format, beautify, minify, and validate JSON.

item.title: Regex Tester
item.description: Test regex patterns with real-time match highlighting.

item.title: Base64 Encode/Decode
item.description: Encode and decode Base64 text and files.

item.title: URL Encode/Decode
item.description: Encode and decode URLs, parse query parameters.

item.title: Hash Generator
item.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashes.

item.title: JWT Decoder
item.description: Decode JSON Web Tokens with color-coded output.

item.title: UUID / ULID Generator
item.description: Generate UUID v4 and ULID identifiers in bulk.

item.title: Timestamp Converter
item.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and dates.

item.title: Cron Builder
item.description: Build and validate cron expressions visually.

item.title: Image Converter
item.description: Convert images between formats in your browser.

item.title: PDF Merge
item.description: Combine multiple PDF files into one. Files never leave your browser.

item.title: PDF Compress
item.description: Reduce PDF file size without uploading. 100% client-side.

item.title: PDF Split
item.description: Extract specific pages from a PDF. 100% client-side.

item.title: Meta Tag Generator
item.description: Generate meta titles, descriptions, OG tags, and Twitter cards with live SERP previews.

item.title: Schema Generator
item.description: Build JSON-LD structured data for Articles, FAQs, Products, and more.

item.title: SEO Content Analyzer
item.description: Analyze content for keyword density, heading structure, readability, and SEO score.

item.title: Readability Scorer
item.description: Grade content with Flesch-Kincaid, Gunning Fog, SMOG, and more.

item.title: UTM Builder
item.description: Build campaign URLs with UTM parameters, presets, and bulk generation.

item.title: Comparison Table Builder
item.description: Create feature comparison tables with export to HTML, PNG, and Markdown.

item.title: Positioning Statement Builder
item.description: Build positioning statements with guided frameworks from Dunford, Moore, and more.
